title: bidens andrei
intro: Bidens andrei, also known as Bidens andrei Maxim., is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Bidens andrei has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, and can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its health benefits.
